# VVIP Operations Checklist: Luna Wavelength

## PLATINUM Tier Protocol -- GalactiCorp Space Industries

---

**Visitor:** Luna Wavelength, Chief Innovation Officer, GalactiCorp Space Industries

## PLATINUM PROTOCOL REQUIREMENTS

> **This is a PLATINUM tier briefing. Platinum protocol is mandatory, not optional. Every item below must be confirmed before the visitor arrives.**

| Element | Requirement | Status |

## Pre-Briefing (T-21 days to T-1 day)

### Stakeholder Notifications (T-21 days)

- [ ] **Notify Executive Sponsor** -- Roberto Vega (rvega@redhat.com)
  - Confirm lobby greeting at 8:30 AM (joint with EBC Manager)
  - Confirm strategic vision session at 9:00 AM
  - Brief on NIST compliance findings and $8M blocker
  - Share complete dossier and security audit report
  - Confirm full-day calendar hold
- [ ] **Notify CEO Office** -- Schedule CEO drop-in for 12:00 PM (Platinum mandate)
  - Provide CEO dossier briefing 48 hours in advance
  - Confirm 15-minute minimum presence
  - Prepare ceremonial NIST document handover from CEO to Drake
- [ ] **Notify Security Engineering Lead** -- Confirm in-person attendance for Drake track
- [ ] **Notify Account Team** -- Confirm full dual-track presenter roster
- [ ] **Notify EBC Operations** -- Submit Platinum VVIP briefing request
- [ ] **Verify Colonel Drake's security clearance** if any classified discussion is planned

### Travel & Accommodation (T-14 days)

- [ ] **Book car service from Denver International Airport (DEN)** to Raleigh-Durham Airport (RDU)
  - Note: Luna may be flying commercial or on GalactiCorp corporate aircraft
  - Confirm tail number if corporate aircraft
- [ ] **Arrange Executive Suite accommodation**
  - Red Hat-preferred hotel near EBC
  - Luxury tier room
  - Late checkout confirmed
- [ ] **Book car service from hotel to EBC** for briefing day
- [ ] **Book return car service** from EBC to airport
- [ ] **Verify travel details with Luna's executive assistant**

### Room & Facilities (T-14 days)

- [ ] **Book Premier Boardroom** (MANDATORY) -- Full day, 7:30 AM to 6:00 PM
- [ ] **Book Secure Meeting Room** for Drake's parallel security track
- [ ] **Book isolated lab environment** for air-gapped deployment demo
  - Verify actual air-gap (no internet connectivity)
  - Pre-populated mirror registry
  - Backup environment ready
- [ ] **Verify Premier Boardroom setup:**
  - Premium boardroom table and chairs
  - Large displays (both primary and secondary)
  - Whiteboards (Luna prefers whiteboards)
  - Premium AV system tested
  - Video conferencing capability
  - Power outlets and charging stations
  - Personalized welcome display on primary screen
- [ ] **Book backup rooms** for both primary and secondary tracks

### Catering (T-10 days)

- [ ] **Dietary requirements confirmed:** Vegetarian (Luna)
- [ ] **Beverage preferences confirmed:** Earl grey tea, sparkling water, fresh juices
- [ ] **Colonel Drake dietary requirements:** Confirm at scheduling
- [ ] **Submit premium catering order:**
  - 8:00 AM -- Executive breakfast (vegetarian spread, fruit, pastries, yogurt, earl grey tea, sparkling water, fresh juices)
  - 10:30 AM -- Break refresh: earl grey tea, sparkling water, light snacks
  - 12:00 PM -- Formal plated vegetarian executive lunch (multi-course, premium tier)
  - 2:30 PM -- Afternoon refresh: earl grey tea, sparkling water, premium snacks
  - 4:30 PM -- Premium close-out service
- [ ] **Confirm premium catering vendor** with vegetarian specifications
- [ ] **Verify earl grey tea source** (Luna has mentioned preference for specific brand)
- [ ] **Menu pre-approved** by EBC Platinum Protocol Lead

### Welcome & Materials (T-7 days)

- [ ] **Personalized welcome display** (premium format)
  - Lobby screen: "Welcome, Luna Wavelength, GalactiCorp Space Industries"
  - Premier Boardroom entry: Same format with GalactiCorp logo
  - Hotel room: Welcome card from EBC Manager
  - Car service: Interior welcome card
- [ ] **Print bound materials packet** (premium leather portfolio)
  - Full briefing agenda
  - NIST 800-171 remediation document (bound, formal)
  - Satellite ground station edge architecture document
  - Air-gapped deployment guide
  - Security compliance mapping
  - Commitment letter draft
- [ ] **Prepare ceremonial NIST document** for CEO handover to Drake
- [ ] **Prepare digital materials** -- Secure encrypted USB with all presentation files

### Presenter Preparation (T-7 days)

- [ ] **Distribute presenter briefing packets** to all dual-track presenters
- [ ] **Brief all presenters on communication style:**
  - Very high technical depth -- Luna is a former NASA JPL engineer
  - She will test everything hands-on
  - Open-source transparency is critical
  - Honest admissions of gaps are better than marketing claims
- [ ] **Conduct dry run** for NIST remediation session (highest risk)
- [ ] **Conduct dry run** for air-gapped deployment lab
- [ ] **Verify security engineering lead is in person**
- [ ] **Verify edge computing engineering lead is in person**

### Gift (T-7 days)

- [ ] **Select Platinum tier space/NASA themed gift**
  - Recommend: authentic Apollo-era navigation manual (vintage), handcrafted astronomy instrument, or signed print from NASA JPL history
  - Premium gift budget tier
  - Must be unique and meaningful (Luna will recognize generic gifts)
- [ ] **Premium gift wrapping and presentation box**
- [ ] **Handwritten personalized card** from EBC Manager
- [ ] **Confirm gift is available** on briefing day

### Final Confirmation (T-3 days)

- [ ] **Send agenda to Luna** (7-day lead time for Platinum visitors)
- [ ] **Confirm Luna's travel arrangements**
- [ ] **Confirm Colonel Drake's attendance and clearance**

- [ ] **Confirm Roberto Vega availability** for full day

- [ ] **Print all materials** and assemble leather portfolios

### T-1 Day

## Day-of Operations

### Pre-Arrival (6:30 AM - 8:00 AM)

- [ ] **EBC Platinum Protocol Lead arrives by 6:30 AM**
- [ ] **Full room walkthrough and setup check** -- Premier Boardroom + parallel room
- [ ] **Verify welcome displays** are active in all locations
- [ ] **Verify premium catering setup** -- Executive breakfast in place
- [ ] **Place bound leather portfolios** at each attendee seat
- [ ] **Final AV test** on all displays and audio
- [ ] **Verify CEO calendar hold** for 12:00 PM drop-in
- [ ] **Confirm Roberto Vega is en route** for 8:30 AM lobby greeting
- [ ] **Verify car service arrival** with Luna at hotel

### Lobby Greeting (8:15 AM - 8:30 AM)

- [ ] **Roberto Vega positions at lobby** by 8:15 AM
- [ ] **EBC Manager positions at lobby** by 8:15 AM (both must be present)
- [ ] **Greet Luna by name** at lobby entrance (formal Platinum greeting)
- [ ] **Greet Colonel Drake** with formal clearance acknowledgment
- [ ] **Escort to Premier Boardroom** -- executive route only
- [ ] **Offer beverage on arrival** -- Earl grey tea for Luna
- [ ] **Introduce to morning session presenters**

### During Briefing

- [ ] **Monitor catering timing:**
  - 10:30 AM -- Break refresh delivered to both rooms
  - 12:00 PM -- Formal executive lunch setup in Premier Boardroom
  - 2:30 PM -- Afternoon refresh
  - 4:30 PM -- Close-out service
- [ ] **CEO drop-in at 12:00 PM:**
  - [ ] Confirm CEO is on site at 11:45 AM
  - [ ] Brief CEO one final time with any updates from morning sessions
  - [ ] Have ceremonial NIST document ready for CEO handover
  - [ ] Ensure minimum 15 minutes presence (Platinum mandate)
- [ ] **Monitor parallel track progress** -- Drake's NIST session is highest risk
- [ ] **Lab session (3:00 PM):**
  - [ ] Verify isolated lab environment is fully air-gapped
  - [ ] Backup environment ready
  - [ ] Security engineering SME available for questions
- [ ] **Be available for all ad-hoc requests**

### Gift Presentation (4:30 PM -- during close-out)

- [ ] **Present premium gift** during close-out session
- [ ] **Handwritten note from CEO + Sponsor + EBC Manager**
- [ ] **Ceremonial NIST document** handed to Drake

### Departure

- [ ] **Roberto Vega and EBC Manager both escort Luna to lobby**
- [ ] **Confirm car service is ready** at lobby
- [ ] **Final thank-you from both Roberto and EBC Manager**
- [ ] **Verify return transportation to hotel**
- [ ] **Confirm next-day departure logistics**

  - NIST 800-171 remediation delivery milestones
  - Satellite ground station proposal next steps
  - Air-gapped deployment decision timeline
  - Joint engineering working group formation

- [ ] **Update engagement score** in CRM (maintain 94+)
- [ ] **Update relationship stage** (maintain Champion)
- [ ] **Brief CEO and Roberto Vega** on outcomes

### NPS & Feedback (T+3 days)

- [ ] **Send formal NPS survey**
- [ ] **Target score:** 10/10 (Platinum expectation)
- [ ] **Log feedback** and distribute to presenter team

### Pipeline Updates (T+7 days)

  - Air-Gapped Cluster Deployment ($1.2M) -- advance based on lab outcome

## Protocol Reference: PLATINUM VVIP Tier

Platinum is the highest tier in the VVIP program. Every element below is mandatory.

| Element | Requirement | Mandatory |
|---------|-------------|-----------|
| Room | Premier Boardroom | YES |
| Accommodation | Executive Suite (Red Hat arranged) | YES |
| Transportation | Car service (both directions) | YES |
| Lobby Greeting | Sponsor + EBC Manager (both) | YES |
| CEO Drop-in | 15 min minimum | YES |
| Catering | Premium formal | YES |
| Sponsor Presence | Full day | YES |
| Gift | Premium, personalized | YES |
| Thank-you Notes | CEO + Sponsor + EBC Manager | YES |
| Materials | Leather-bound portfolio | YES |
| Welcome Display | All locations | YES |
| Lead Time | 7 days minimum | YES |
